subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast turned thy face toward the Countenance! We have willed to send unto thee a remembrance from the Mother Book, that it may draw thee unto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها المتوجه الی الوجه انا اردنا ان نرسل الیک ذکرا من ام الکتاب لیجذبک الی
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
